comment: Love the new dashboard — finally a simple way to see all my runs at once.
suggested_response: We're so glad to hear you're enjoying the new dashboard and finding it useful for tracking your runs!

comment: Logs are useful but scrolling through 500 lines to find one error is painful.
suggested_response: I understand how frustrating it can be to scroll through so many lines of logs to find a single error.

comment: The webhook trigger feature is great. Worked first try.
suggested_response: We're so glad to hear that you found the webhook trigger feature great and that it worked perfectly for you on the first try!

comment: Billing is confusing. Got charged twice last month and support took 5 days to respond.
suggested_response: We're very sorry to hear about the billing issue and the delay in our support response, and we understand your frustration.

comment: When will there be a Python SDK? The HTTP API is fine but an SDK would be faster.
suggested_response: We appreciate your feedback and understand the potential benefits of a Python SDK for faster development.

comment: Great tool overall. No complaints yet.
suggested_response: We're thrilled to hear you're enjoying our tool so far!

comment: Archive button is in a weird spot and I've hit delete twice by accident.
suggested_response: We're sorry to hear that the archive and delete button placement has caused frustration and accidental deletions.

comment: Just wanted to say thanks — this replaced three cron jobs and saved my weekend.
suggested_response: We're so glad to hear our product was able to simplify your workflow and give you back your weekend!

comment: Docs could be more specific about how secrets interact with pipelines.
suggested_response: Thank you for your feedback; we understand that more specific documentation on how secrets interact with pipelines would be valuable.

comment: I really dislike the dark theme's contrast on small text. Please add a high-contrast option.
suggested_response: We understand your frustration with the dark theme's contrast on small text, and we appreciate your suggestion for a high-contrast option.
